modeling_constraints: Use portable Spectre-compatible Verilog-A and voltage contributions for public outputs.
Do not use branch-current oracles, hidden pass/fail ports, checker side channels, or testbench code in the DUT bundle.

properties.observable_contract: Reset centers the continuous sum and difference outputs and clears sampled metrics and balance qualification.
sum_out and diff_out implement the clipped common and differential mappings of port_a and port_b around vcm.
The signed three-bit trim correction shifts sum and difference in opposite directions by trim_lsb per code.
At rising clock edges forward and reverse metrics reconstruct the directional components from the mapped sum and difference outputs.
balance_ok asserts only after two consecutive metric updates whose directional mismatch is within balance_tol.

title: Bidirectional Hybrid Macro
